title: For When You Get Lost
overview: In this uplifting and emotionally charged comedy, inspired by a real road trip, June Stevenson drags her estranged sisters up the Pacific Coast to make amends with their difficult father. Along the way, she distracts herself with picturesque landmarks, craft breweries, and picturesque men in craft breweries, but ultimately, she must face the fact that there’s more to her family’s fractures than she thought.
